case_title: CRISTELL YASSODARA PIAZ GOMEZ VS. IRIS SILVA AGUIRRE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PIAZ GOMEZ, CRISTELL YASSODARA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-22-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CRISTELL YASSODARA PIAZ GOMEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IRIS SILVA AGUIRRE IS PRESENT. BOTH PARTIES ARE ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PIAZ GOMEZ, CRISTELL YASSODARA AGUIRRE, IRIS SILVA DBA JUDITH AKA PERFUMERIA JUDITH
